response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform development, with most of their work centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang in web and GIS applications; there is no evidence of leadership in cloud compute systems or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers as required.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across multiple languages and domains
Proven track record of open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Demonstrated ability to lead complex projects from conception to production
concerns: No demonstrable 8+ years of C++ experience as required
Lacks proven experience in cloud compute platforms, distributed systems, or hardware architecture
No evidence of technical leadership in cloud or DevOps engineering teams
